'''Petrakis''' was the site of the first engagement between [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. During an attack on an Imperial convoy that carried a squadron of Fighters, the escorting TIEs were so panicked when they first encountered the attacking B-Wings that they left formation and fled. So the rebel starfighters managed to destroy the whole convoy consisting of several Freighters, Transports and Shuttlecraft despite the arrival of imperial reinforcements, a full wing of assault gunboats.

{{Planet-stub}}
